tasks.label: Django: Make Migrations (Docker)
tasks.command: docker compose exec web python manage.py makemigrations

tasks.label: Django: Migrate (Docker)
tasks.command: docker compose exec web python manage.py migrate

tasks.label: Django: Make Messages (Docker)
tasks.command: docker compose exec web python manage.py makemessages -l eu -l es -l en

tasks.label: Django: Compile Messages (Docker)
tasks.command: docker compose exec web python manage.py compilemessages

tasks.label: Django: Init Apps (Docker)
tasks.command: docker compose exec web python manage.py init_apps

tasks.label: Django: Seed Pintxos (Docker)
tasks.command: docker compose exec web python manage.py seed_pintxos

tasks.label: Django: Seed Mock Data (Docker)
tasks.command: docker compose exec web python manage.py seed_mock_data

tasks.label: Django: Seed Inguru (Docker)
tasks.command: docker compose exec web python manage.py seed_inguru

tasks.label: Django: Load Events Kultur (Docker)
tasks.command: docker compose exec web python manage.py load_events

tasks.label: Django: Load SBK Events (Docker)
tasks.command: docker compose exec web python manage.py load_sbk_events

tasks.label: Django: Seed All (Docker)
tasks.command: docker compose exec web bash -c "python manage.py seed_pintxos && python manage.py seed_mock_data && python manage.py seed_inguru && python manage.py load_events && python manage.py load_sbk_events"
